intent: Write a budget split on 'new-to-retirement hobby startup' for someone with $200 to spend on a single new hobby. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the sports-outdoors, toys-games, and office-products categories and collect at least 4 products relevant to three different hobby directions (e.g. birding gear, board game, art supply, fishing). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskMen AND /f/AskReddit for posts on starting a hobby later in life, regret versus stickiness. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present 3 hobby directions with storefront-anchored starter kits, (b) use community data on which hobbies people stick with, (c) commit to a recommendation for a specific persona (you define it). Cite every claim.
author_notes: Medium tier. Hobby selection with persona reasoning.
